steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the rental table
steps.content: The answer choices are linear functions of rental time, so enter the two table points in Desmos: $x_1=[4,6]$ and $y_1=[90,130]$. Then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=20$ and $b=10$, so the graphable model is $y=20x+10$.

steps.title: Connect the model to the fee structure
steps.content: The slope 20 means each additional hour adds $20. The expression $20x+10$ is equivalent to a $30 first-hour charge plus $20 for each hour after the first, because $30+20(x-1)=20x+10$.

steps.title: Write the function and identify the answer
steps.content: Choice C is $f(x)=20x+10$. It checks the table: $f(4)=80+10=90$ and $f(6)=120+10=130$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
